CustomField.description: When enabled, the nightly Recurring Donation rollup batch job only recalculates Recurring Donations that have recently modified Opportunities, as determined by the RD Modified in Last Number of Days setting. This improves batch performance in orgs with many Recurring Donations. Disabled by default.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Only recalculate Recurring Donations with recently modified Opportunities during nightly batch jobs. Uses the RD Modified in Last Number of Days value.
CustomField.label: Limit Recalculated Recurring Donations
